title: npm package name with common character transpositions
description: A package name contains common character transpositions of popular npm packages (lodash, axios, requests, express, react, angular, colors).
remediation: Verify package names against the official npm registry. Use npm info to check package metadata and download counts.

title: PyPI package name with common typosquatting patterns
description: A Python package name resembles a popular PyPI package but with typos (requests, beautifulsoup4, numpy, pandas, flask, django).
remediation: Double-check package names. Use pip show to verify package metadata. Review new dependencies in code review.

title: Package name similar to popular package with prefix/suffix
description: A package name uses a popular package name with added prefixes (python-, node-) or suffixes (-utils, -helper). This is a common typosquatting pattern.
remediation: Verify that prefixed/suffixed packages are from the same maintainer as the original. Check package provenance and download history.
